{"society_power": 1.5, "state_power": 8.5, "society_change": -2.5, "state_change": 2.5, "key_event": "CCP consolidation: collectivization, purges, danwei/hukou, Great Leap", "reasoning": "The CCP built a pervasive party-state penetrating villages, factories, and neighborhoods while nationalizing commerce and collectivizing agriculture, pushing state power into the strong/overwhelming range. Simultaneously, land reform, the Anti-Rightist purges, thought reform, and the crushing of gentry, capitalists, and intellectuals atomized society to near-total suppression."}
